Title: Relates to the purpose of the Macedon Center Volunteer and Exempt Firemen's Benevolent Association, Inc., and the use of foreign fire insurance premium taxes
Summary: Relates to the purpose of the Macedon Center Volunteer and Exempt Firemen's Benevolent Association, Inc., and the use of foreign fire insurance premium taxes.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend chapter 117 of the laws of 1983 incorporating the Macedon Center Volunteer and Exempt Firemen's Benevolent Association, Inc., and providing for its powers and duties, in relation to the purpose of such association and the use of foreign fire insurance premium taxes
